strategies.name: Congress Buys
strategies.description: Tracks recent stock purchases by members of Congress, weighted by reported purchase size with weekly rebalancing.

strategies.name: Dan Meuser
strategies.description: Mirrors the portfolio of Rep. Dan Meuser (and family), rebalanced when new trades or annual reports are reported.

strategies.name: Sector Weighted DC Insider
strategies.description: Tracks aggregated insider trading activity weighted by sector allocation with weekly rebalancing.

strategies.name: Michael Burry
strategies.description: Mirrors Scion Asset Management's portfolio using 13F filings, rebalanced when new filings are reported.

strategies.name: Lobbying Spending Growth
strategies.description: Invests in companies with growing lobbying budgets, identifying firms increasing political influence.

strategies.name: Transportation and Infra. Committee (House)
strategies.description: Tracks stocks purchased by current/past members of the U.S. House's Transportation and Infrastructure Committee (or their family). Weighted based on reported purchase size, with weekly rebalancing.

strategies.name: U.S. House Long-Short
strategies.description: Tracks stocks purchased or sold by U.S. House members (or family). Long position in purchases, short position in sales. Employs leverage with 130% long exposure and 30% short exposure, with weekly rebalancing.

strategies.name: Top Gov Contract Recipients
strategies.description: Selects top 20 government contract recipients, weighted by contract values. Uses exponential moving average to favor recent contracts while weighing historical ones. Rebalanced monthly.

strategies.name: Donald Beyer
strategies.description: Mirrors the portfolio of Rep. Don Beyer (and family). Rebalanced when new trades or annual reports are reported.

strategies.name: Josh Gottheimer
strategies.description: Mirrors the portfolio of Rep. Josh Gottheimer (and family). Rebalanced when new trades or annual reports are reported.

strategies.name: Top Lobbying Spenders
strategies.description: Equal-weighted position in 10 publicly-traded companies with most lobbying spending over the last quarter. Rebalanced monthly.

strategies.name: Nancy Pelosi
strategies.description: Mirrors the portfolio of Rep. Nancy Pelosi (and family). Rebalanced when new trades or annual reports are reported.

strategies.name: Sheldon Whitehouse
strategies.description: Mirrors the portfolio of Senator Sheldon Whitehouse (and family). Rebalanced when new trades or annual reports are reported.

strategies.name: Howard Marks
strategies.description: Mirrors Howard Marks's Oaktree Capital Management portfolio using 13F filings. Rebalanced when new filings are reported.

strategies.name: Bill Ackman
strategies.description: Mirrors Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital Management portfolio using 13F filings. Rebalanced when new filings are reported.

strategies.name: Wall Street Conviction
strategies.description: Uses 13F filings for institutions with $100M+ holdings to find each fund's highest conviction stock in the S&P500. Conviction measured as portfolio allocation minus S&P500 allocation. Equal-weighted positions, rebalanced quarterly 47 days after quarter end.

strategies.name: Stanley Druckenmiller
strategies.description: Mirrors Stanley Druckenmiller's Duquesne Family Office portfolio via SEC 13F filings. Rebalanced on filing dates.

strategies.name: David Tepper
strategies.description: Mirrors David Tepper's Appaloosa LP portfolio via SEC 13F filings. Concentrated long-only US equity, rebalanced on filing dates.

strategies.name: Seth Klarman
strategies.description: Mirrors Seth Klarman's Baupost Group portfolio via SEC 13F filings. Value-oriented + special situations, rebalanced on filing dates.

strategies.name: Mohnish Pabrai
strategies.description: Mirrors Mohnish Pabrai's Pabrai Investment Funds via SEC 13F filings. Highly concentrated value, rebalanced on filing dates.

strategies.name: Li Lu
strategies.description: Mirrors Li Lu's Himalaya Capital Management portfolio via SEC 13F filings. Concentrated long-term value, rebalanced on filing dates.

strategies.name: Chuck Akre
strategies.description: Mirrors Akre Capital Management's portfolio (Chuck Akre's three-legged-stool compounder framework) via SEC 13F filings. Rebalanced on filing dates.

strategies.name: Warren Buffett
strategies.description: Mirrors Berkshire Hathaway's top-20 13F positions. Quarterly rebalance on filing date.

strategies.name: David Einhorn
strategies.description: Mirrors David Einhorn's Greenlight Capital portfolio via SEC 13F filings. Value-oriented long-short manager (long leg only).

strategies.name: Dan Loeb
strategies.description: Mirrors Dan Loeb's Third Point portfolio via SEC 13F filings. Event-driven and activist long positions, rebalanced on filing dates.

strategies.name: Tiger Global
strategies.description: Mirrors Tiger Global Management top-25 13F positions. Concentrated growth/tech long book, rebalanced on filing dates.

strategies.name: Coatue Management
strategies.description: Mirrors Coatue Management top-25 13F positions. Tech-growth tilt, rebalanced on filing dates.

strategies.name: Sequoia Fund
strategies.description: Mirrors the Sequoia Fund (Ruane, Cunniff & Goldfarb) 13F portfolio. Quality long-term compounders, rebalanced on filing dates.

strategies.name: Off-Exchange Short Squeeze
strategies.description: Long top-20 US common stocks by 5-day average off-exchange short volume ratio (FINRA CNMS daily data, the same dataset Quiver resells). Liquidity filter: 500k+ daily share volume, present every day in window. Squeeze-hope thesis. Equal-weighted, weekly Monday rebalance.

strategies.name: Off-Exchange Short Squeeze (Monthly)
strategies.description: Same FINRA off-exchange short-ratio signal as the weekly variant, but with a 21-day lookback and monthly rebalance. ~8× less turnover reduces cost drag; the longer lookback smooths out noise in the short-volume signal.

strategies.name: WSB Mentions Momentum
strategies.description: LIVE-ONLY (no historical backtest available — ApeWisdom does not expose history). Long top-10 common stocks by 24h mention-count growth on r/wallstreetbets via the free ApeWisdom API. ETFs filtered out via NASDAQ Trader directory. Equal-weighted, weekly Monday rebalance. Paper-trade forward for 4–8 weeks before enabling for real.

strategies.name: SMB Factor Regime
strategies.description: Long-only ETF rotation between IWN (Russell 2000 Value) and IWD (Russell 1000 Value) based on an SMB regime signal. The signal is a Logistic Regression model trained on Fama-French monthly data (1926–2000) and deployed in real-time using IWM-SPY as an SMB proxy (corr=0.91). SMB regime ON → IWN (market + value + size premiums); OFF → IWD (market + value). Monthly rebalancing. Backtest 2000–2026: CAGR 9.8%, Sharpe 0.65, MaxDD -52.1% vs SPY 8.3% / 0.61 / -50.8%.
